title: Merge sort producing a sorted permutation of the input

informal_statement.text:
Given a slice of integers, return a new vector containing the same multiset of elements in nondecreasing order.

Benchmark note (sorting_merge_sort_005): Variant 5 stresses monotonicity or stability properties implied by the reference implementation.
Authoring lens: Lens 5 highlights obligations that must remain checkable against the behavioral oracle.
preconditions: the input is a slice of i32 values of any length
required_properties: the output length equals the input length
the output is sorted in nondecreasing order
the output is a permutation of the input (same multiset of elements)
edge_cases: slice of length that is a power of two
slice of length that is not a power of two
